And what shocking move did a carjacker make to rescue a baby trapped in a scorching car? These are the wild, unexpected stories of heroes you'd never see coming.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Uncover the wild beginnings behind ordinary objects, legendary figures, and even the sayings we use every day. Why did Abraham Lincoln once step into the wrestling ring? How do million-dollar birds procreate? What's the story behind a dog that ignited an international conflict? These are the strangest origin tales you've never heard-and won't believe!

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Did a backyard stargazer capture video of UFOs over Chattanooga, Tennessee? Has the biblical Ark of the Covenant been discovered in a cave? Tony Harris and his team of experts analyze the video evidence to find the truth.
